testimonials.name: Maria Gonzalez
testimonials.text: Julian delivered a complex Next.js application ahead of schedule. His attention to performance optimization and clean code architecture exceeded our expectations. The application handles thousands of daily users without any issues.

testimonials.name: Carlos Mendez
testimonials.text: Working with Julian on our full-stack platform was a great experience. He brought deep expertise in both frontend and backend, and his communication throughout the project was excellent.

testimonials.name: Laura Chen
testimonials.text: Julian built our AI-powered audio processing pipeline from scratch. His knowledge of Python, FastAPI, and machine learning frameworks was instrumental in bringing our product to market.

testimonials.name: David Ruiz
testimonials.text: The WordPress solution Julian developed transformed our content workflow. Custom plugins, optimized database queries, and a beautiful admin interface — all delivered with professionalism.

testimonials.name: Ana Torres
testimonials.text: Julian's database modeling and API design skills are top-notch. He redesigned our data layer with PostgreSQL and Supabase, significantly improving query performance and reliability.
